payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Partial, edge-cropped view of a dark-stained wooden cabinet door with vertical recessed panels and visible wood grain and a slightly glossy finish; lower section near the floor is visible and the door shows minor wear—appears close to the camera (approx. 0.6 m).
